nodes.context: Umbrella term for community-based militia groups in DRC, active in eastern provinces.
Powerful Mai-Mai group in Kivus, organized in 2007 by General Yakutumba.

nodes.standard_name: Mudundu 40/Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu
nodes.original_text_name: Mudundu 40/Front de Résistance et de Défense du Kivu (FRDKI)
nodes.context: Smaller Mai-Mai group cooperating with Rwandan military and RCD-Goma.

nodes.standard_name: Mouvement de Lutte contre l'Agression au Zaïre/Forces Unies de Résistance Nationale contre l'Agression de la République Démocratique du Congo

nodes.context: Smaller Mai-Mai group cooperating with Rwandan military and RCD-Goma.

nodes.original_text_name: Nduma Defense of Congo (or Mai-Mai Sheka)
nodes.context: Mai-Mai group formed in 2009 by Ntabo Ntaberi Sheka, active in North Kivu.
Separatist Mai-Mai group formed by Gédéon Kyungu Mutanga after his escape in 2011.
Mai-Mai group commanded by Gedeon Kyungu Mutanga, loosely tied to Mai-Mai Kata Katanga.

nodes.standard_name: Co-ordination for a Referendum on Self-determination for Katanga
aliases: Co-ordination for a Referendum on Self-determination for Katanga
nodes.context: Group composed mainly of former Katanga Tigers, separatist group active in 1960s.
Rwanda-allied rebel faction controlling Kivus during Second Congo War.
